mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.bookmark_id AS bookmarkId, b.resource_id AS resourceId, b.content, b.author_note AS authorNote, b.click_count AS clickCount, b.ctime, b.mtime, r.title AS bookTitle, r.cover_url AS resourceCoverUrl, r.author_name AS authorName FROM bookmark b LEFT JOIN resource r ON b.resource_id = r.resource_id WHERE b.status = 1 AND b.deleted = 0 ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 1
SELECT id, bookmark_id, resource_id, content, author_note, click_count, ctime, mtime FROM bookmark WHERE bookmark_id = #{bookmarkId}
mapper.update: UPDATE bookmark SET click_count = click_count + 1, mtime = NOW() WHERE bookmark_id = #{bookmarkId}
